enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kanthasamy en peru meenakumari?

The song is an energetic item number that adds a lively and peppy vibe to the movie.

Who is the singer of this song?

Malathy is the singer of this vibrant track.

Who composed the music for Kandhasamy?

The music for Kandhasamy was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

What role does this song play in the movie?

This song serves as a lively and entertaining item number that enhances the film's energetic moments.

When was the movie Kandhasamy released?

The movie Kandhasamy was released in 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kanthasamy en peru meenakumari from the movie Kandhasamy is a high-energy item number that captivates audiences with its vibrant beats and catchy lyrics. Sung by Malathy, the track is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, known for his dynamic musical style. The song adds a festive and lively atmosphere to the film, making it perfect for party and celebration settings. Its playful and upbeat nature makes it a memorable addition to the movie's soundtrack, leaving listeners energized and entertained.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the pulse of excitement with Kanthasamy en peru meenakumari from the electrifying movie Kandhasamy. Malathy's vibrant vocals combined with Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic beats create an unforgettable musical experience. Dive into the energetic world of this iconic item number that will make you want to dance along!
